entries.original_str: Cannot start QR scanner, no usable camera found.

entries.original_str: Startup times are instant because it operates in conjunction with high-performance servers that handle the most complicated parts of the Bitcoin system.
entries.translation: Startup times are instant because it operates in conjunction with high-performance servers that handle the most complicated parts of the Bitcoin system.
